hyperedges.label: Conductor delegates auth selection to scheduler for built-in selectors; falls back to legacy pick for custom selectors or route-aware alias resolution

Region affinity: Auth.AffinityGroup() groups Bedrock by region; scheduler sticky-pins to preferred region; bestAffinityGroup selects largest healthy group; RecordAffinityResult blacklists after 3 consecutive failures (5min ban)

Error classification drives cooldown: isClientParamError -> no penalty; isBedrockThrottlingError -> 30s; isBedrockAccessDeniedError -> 24h; isDailyUsageLimitError -> 30min; 429 -> exponential backoff 1s..30min; 401/403 -> 30min; 5xx -> 1-3min
Auth lifecycle: StatusUnknown -> StatusActive -> StatusError/StatusRefreshing/StatusPending -> StatusDisabled; ModelState mirrors per-model; aggregated to Auth level via updateAggregatedAvailability

Scheduler hierarchy: authScheduler -> providerScheduler (per-provider) -> modelScheduler (per-model shard) -> readyBucket (priority buckets) -> readyView (flat or grouped round-robin with cursor preservation across rebuilds)

Skywork 5-layer: global model cooldown (exponential 2min/5min/10min) -> throttle (8 req/30s window, then 2s gap) -> model fallback chain (T1/T2 only, same-family first for light, cross-family first for heavy) -> cross-family reasoning effort mapping

Refusal shield: detect (LevelConfirmed/Uncertain/None) -> verify (optional AI classifier for Uncertain) -> rewrite (external endpoint OR CPA pool OR static templates) -> return refusalShieldError to trigger credential retry with rewritten payload

Model alias chain: rewriteModelForAuth (strip prefix) -> applyOAuthModelAlias (per-channel alias table) -> resolveOpenAICompatUpstreamModelPool (config models) -> applyAPIKeyModelAlias (per-auth cache or slow config scan) -> filterExecutionModels (skip blocked)

hyperedges.description: All four use sync.RWMutex-protected maps with TTL expiration and background cleanup goroutines launched via sync.Once

Provides ParseClaudeUsage, ParseOpenAIUsage, ParseGeminiUsage, ParseGeminiCLIUsage, ParseAntigravityUsage, ParseCodexUsage plus streaming variants and FilterSSEUsageMetadata shared by aistudio/antigravity executors

Two HTTP client factories: NewProxyAwareHTTPClient (standard with proxy+caching) and NewUtlsHTTPClient (Chrome TLS fingerprint for Anthropic). utls_client reuses buildProxyTransport from proxy_helpers
Cloaking features: ShouldCloak decision, generateFakeUserID/CachedUserID identity fabrication, CachedSessionID session persistence, ObfuscateSensitiveWords content modification
Claude-specific protocol helpers: builtin tool registry augmentation and device profile stabilization with version-aware upgrade logic and Stainless SDK header management
SharedCredential holds canonical OAuth metadata; VirtualCredential tracks per-project entries referencing a shared parent. ResolveSharedCredential dispatches on runtime type

hyperedges.label: All 12 executors implement ProviderExecutor
Executors translating to OpenAI format
Executors translating to Gemini format
Executors using compat_helpers.go wrappers
Executors calling helps.* package directly
Gemini family sharing helper functions and constants
Executors with dynamic model discovery (FetchXxxModels)
All executors follow NewUsageReporter -> defer TrackFailure -> Publish pattern
All executors use statusErr for error reporting
Executors with non-standard transport (not REST/HTTP)

hyperedges.description: Three-level scheduling: authScheduler -> providerScheduler -> modelScheduler, with modelScheduler owning readyBucket/cooldownQueue views for pick operations
FillFirst strategy uses affinity groups (e.g. Bedrock regions) for sticky region selection with 3-failure blacklisting (5min) and automatic failover
Config model entries with Alias fields are loaded via SetConfig and resolved at request time by lookupAPIKeyUpstreamModel; hot-reload replaces alias mappings atomically
Auth entries transition between Ready/Cooldown/Blocked/Disabled states; promoteExpiredLocked re-evaluates blocked entries whose retry time has elapsed
When all entries have gemini_virtual_parent attributes with 2+ groups, readyView uses grouped round-robin (parent rotation then child rotation) instead of flat round-robin

hyperedges.label: Fallback handler checks providers via mapper, rewrites model in request, wraps response with rewriter
AmpModule composes proxy, routes, management routes, fallback handler, and gemini bridge into a single RouteModuleV2
Config aggregates credentials for six provider types into a unified configuration
Logging middleware wraps gin.ResponseWriter to capture request/response data for the logger
Manager provides global registry, Pool handles hot-reload and sticky selection, Entry holds header credentials
Config-to-Auth synthesis pipeline
hyperedges.relation: Config YAML keys are read into config.Config, passed via SynthesisContext to ConfigSynthesizer which uses StableIDGenerator to produce deterministic coreauth.Auth entries

hyperedges.label: Model hash-based change detection
hyperedges.relation: All model hash functions normalize name|alias pairs via normalizeModelPairs, deduplicate, sort, and produce SHA256 via hashJoined for hot-reload change detection

hyperedges.label: Config diff detection subsystem
hyperedges.relation: BuildConfigChangeDetails compares old vs new config.Config, delegates to per-provider Summarize functions and Diff functions to produce redacted human-readable change logs

hyperedges.label: Six-provider auth synthesis
hyperedges.relation: ConfigSynthesizer.Synthesize dispatches to six provider-specific methods, each reading from config.Config fields and producing coreauth.Auth entries with provider-specific attributes
